title: HemFeatureInput Object
description: This class defines the methods and properties that pertain to the definition of a hem feature.

methods.name: classType
methods.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().

methods.name: setDoubleHem
methods.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create a double hem feature.

methods.name: setFlatHem
methods.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create a flat hem feature.

methods.name: setOpenHem
methods.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create an open hem feature.

methods.name: setRolledHem
methods.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create a rolled hem feature.

methods.name: setRopeHem
methods.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create a rope hem feature.

methods.name: setTeardropHem
methods.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create a teardrop hem feature.

properties.name: isValid
properties.description: Indicates if this object is still valid, i.e. hasn't been deleted or some other action done to invalidate the reference.

properties.name: objectType
properties.description: This property is supported by all objects in the API and returns a string that contains the full name (namespace::objecttype) describing the type of the object.   It's often useful to use this in combination with the classType method to see if an object is a certain type. For example: if obj.objectType == adsk.core.Point3D.classType():

related_samples.name: Hem Feature Sample
related_samples.description: Demonstrates creating a new sheet metal hem feature.

classType.title: HemFeatureInput.classType Method
classType.description: Static function that all classes support that returns the type of the class as a string. The returned string matches the string returned by the objectType property. For example if you have a reference to an object and you want to check if it's a SketchLine you can use myObject.objectType == fusion.SketchLine.classType().
classType.return_description: Returns a string indicating the type of the object.

setDoubleHem.title: HemFeatureInput.setDoubleHem Method
setDoubleHem.description: Sets the hem input with the values to be used in order to create a double hem feature.

syntax.python: returnValue = hemFeatureInput_var.setDoubleHem(edge, gap, length, setback, isFlipped, bendPositionType)
syntax.cpp:
#include 

returnValue = hemFeatureInput_var->setDoubleHem(edge, gap, length, setback, isFlipped, bendPositionType);

setDoubleHem.return_description: Returns true if defining the hem is successful.

parameters.name: edge
parameters.description: The BRepEdge that defines the location of the hem.

parameters.name: gap
parameters.description: The gap distance of the hem.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: The length of the double hem.

parameters.name: setback
parameters.description: The setback of the double hem.

parameters.name: isFlipped
parameters.description: Indicates if the hem direction is flipped.

parameters.name: bendPositionType
parameters.description: The bend location type for the hem.
